briefs.title: Solar panel racking systems and foundations now exempt from BC school taxes
briefs.summary: Starting December 31, 2025, BC solar power projects get a school tax exemption (a property-related tax normally applied to improvements on land) for their panel racking systems and foundations.
briefs.action_required: Check with your tax advisor if your solar project qualifies for this exemption before filing your next property tax return.

key_dates.label: BC School Tax Exemption for solar racking systems and foundations takes effect
